sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24241" key="deutere/sxatos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δευτερ-έσχᾰτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n24241.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">last but one,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:46:11:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">46.11.23</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
